projectDescription: An autonomous multi-agent AI assistant that runs on Telegram, using a pool of 8 specialized agents coordinated over Redis Streams with free-tier LLM providers.
keyFeatures: 8 specialized autonomous agents (Oracle, CodeSmith, Iris, Echo, Browser, Cortex, Nexus, ZeroClaw)
Multi-provider LLM fallback chain (Groq, Cerebras, SambaNova — all free tier)
Persistent memory via Mem0 + Qdrant vector database
Telegram bot interface with rich command set
Dynamic skill installation from git repos or shell scripts
Process isolation: each agent runs as its own OS process with auto-restart
publicApiSurface: ZeroClawRouter — intent classification and agent dispatch
CodeSmithAgent — code generation, shell execution, GitHub ops
NexusAgent — weather, crypto, MCP tool dispatch
RedisBus — message bus (streams, pub/sub, conversation history)
FallbackChain — multi-provider LLM with automatic failover
SkillsManager — dynamic skill install and execution
ToolRegistry — shared tool registry across agents
